goals.title: Verify that ~/.oh-my-agent-env setup/sync/doctor refactor and shared...
goals.objective: Verify that ~/.oh-my-agent-env setup/sync/doctor refactor and shared skills/MCP configuration function normally across reproducibility, idempotency, and runtime parity. Do not modify product code unless verification exposes a blocking defect.

successCriteria.scenario: CLI structure/load path: current refactored setup/sync/doctor source graph parses, public command functions exist, and smoke-refactor passes.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/verify-runtime/C001-structure-load.txt containing bash -n, smoke-refactor, and function/source file checks.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/verify-runtime/C001-structure-load.txt: bash -n OK; smoke-refactor OK; required functions present | cleanup: no long-running process

successCriteria.scenario: CLI reproducibility/idempotency path: isolated HOME sync --skip-network and validate succeed without touching real HOME, and repeated shell checks remain stable.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/verify-runtime/C002-isolated-idempotency.txt containing repeated bash -n, isolated HOME sync --skip-network output, isolated validate output, generated file sample, and cleanup receipt.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/verify-runtime/C002-isolated-idempotency.txt: repeated bash -n OK; isolated HOME sync --skip-network and validate OK; temp HOME removed | cleanup: temp HOME removed; no long-running process

successCriteria.scenario: Runtime parity path: real doctor and parsed config/symlink checks prove shared skills and MCP entries are present for Claude Code, Codex, and Antigravity; LazyCodex/omo is enabled.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/verify-runtime/C003-runtime-parity.txt containing setup.sh validate, setup.sh doctor summary, symlink inventory for ~/.claude ~/.codex ~/.gemini ~/.agents, parsed MCP config presence, LazyCodex plugin line, and git status.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/verify-runtime/C003-runtime-parity.txt: validate OK; doctor rc 0; LazyCodex omo@sisyphuslabs enabled; shared skill symlinks present; Claude/Codex/Antigravity MCP config entries present; only warnings are credential dir permissions 755 | cleanup: no long-running process

goals.evidence: C001-C003 pass; setup/sync/doctor and shared skills/MCP runtime parity verified; only warning is credential/state dir mode 755.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/verify-oh-my-agent-env-runtime-20260621/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/verify-oh-my-agent-env-runtime-20260621/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

aggregateCompletion.evidence: C001-C003 pass; setup/sync/doctor and shared skills/MCP runtime parity verified; only warning is credential/state dir mode 755.

goal.objective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/verify-oh-my-agent-env-runtime-20260621/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/verify-oh-my-agent-env-runtime-20260621/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
